title: 96-well dose-response layout
description: Pre-labeled 96-well plate: column 1 blanks, column 2 vehicle controls, columns 3-12 samples.

payload.description: Dose-response screen layout. Column 1 = media-only blanks, column 2 = vehicle (DMSO) controls, columns 3-12 = ascending compound concentrations across the plate, 8 replicates per condition down the rows.

region_labels.notes: Media only, no cells. Background subtraction.
Cells + vehicle at the highest carried solvent concentration.
Ascending compound dose left to right (columns 3-12). Eight technical replicates per dose down the rows.
